itemDisplayName: Deploy a Red Hat Enterprise Linux VM (RHEL 9 or RHEL 10) with Trusted Launch
description: Deploys a RHEL Gen2 virtual machine (choose RHEL 9 or RHEL 10) with Trusted Launch (Secure Boot + vTPM), Standard static public IP, SSH key or password authentication, and configurable VM size. Uses Red Hat's PAYG image — no separate Red Hat subscription required.
summary: RHEL 9 or RHEL 10 Gen2 VM with Trusted Launch, Standard IP, and SSH key auth.
